entries.title: Model/view split for artefacts
entries.decision: Agents emit compact validated JSON; a pre-built renderer produces the view. Saving is on presentation, not substance.

entries.title: Local viewer, zero upload
entries.decision: Renderer ships in the plugin, served on 127.0.0.1; no data leaves the machine.

entries.title: Leaner memory keeps tags
entries.decision: Memory entries reduce to title/task/decision plus tags — tags are required for lazy tag-matched injection.
